testcase.name: testSearchProduct
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.id: search_product (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.14' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\viva\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:59930}, goog:processID: 13664, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59930/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: cdc3452250b19750b3be9a67e41c0af8 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pages.BasePage.type(BasePage.java:44) at pages.ProductsPage.searchProduct(ProductsPage.java:62) at tests.ProductsTest.testSearchProduct(ProductsTest.java:38) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ...
